messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Generate a Python script using python-pptx to create a 4-slide minimalist formal presentation for internal legal teams reviewing compliance updates. The output file must be named "legal_compliance.pptx" and all content should be in English. Use the standard 16:9 Widescreen slide size. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs or web scraping to fetch data; use hardcoded sample data only. When adding charts, you must explicitly use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Additionally, implement defensive programming by ensuring that any attempt to set text on a title shape first checks if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
import os


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    hex_color = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(hex_color[0:2], 16), int(hex_color[2:4], 16), int(hex_color[4:6], 16))


NAVY = "#0A2463"
WHITE = "#FFFFFF"
LIGHT_GRAY = "#F5F5F5"
ACCENT_BLUE = "#1E88E5"
DARK_TEXT = "#2C3E50"
MUTED_GRAY = "#7F8C8D"
RED_ACCENT = "#E74C3C"
AMBER_ACCENT = "#F39C12"

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
CARD_WIDTH = Inches(3.8)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.2)


def set_slide_background(prs, slide, color_hex):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, SLIDE_HEIGHT)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    shape.line.fill.background()


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=DARK_TEXT, font_name="Aptos", alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body_text):
    card_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    card_shape.fill.solid()
    card_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
    card_shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(220, 220, 220)
    card_shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.25), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.6))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = title
    run_title.font.size = Pt(13)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(NAVY)
    run_title.font.name = "Aptos"

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.85), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(1.1))
    tf_body = body_box.text_frame
    tf_body.word_wrap = True
    for i, line in enumerate(body_text.split("\n")):
        if i == 0:
            p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p_body = tf_body.add_paragraph()
        run_body = p_body.add_run()
        run_body.text = "• " + line
        run_body.font.size = Pt(11)
        run_body.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DARK_TEXT)
        run_body.font.name = "Aptos"


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, label_text):
    bar_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top + Inches(0.35), Inches(1.2), Pt(3))
    bar_shape.fill.solid()
    bar_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_BLUE)
    bar_shape.line.fill.background()

    label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top - Inches(0.05), Inches(1.2), Inches(0.3))
    tf_label = label_box.text_frame
    p_label = tf_label.paragraphs[0]
    run_label = p_label.add_run()
    run_label.text = label_text.upper()
    run_label.font.size = Pt(9)
    run_label.font.bold = True
    run_label.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_BLUE)
    run_label.font.name = "Aptos"


def add_footer(slide, text="CONFIDENTIAL"):
    footer_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(4.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(4.3), Inches(0.3))
    tf_footer = footer_box.text_frame
    p_footer = tf_footer.paragraphs[0]
    p_footer.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run_footer = p_footer.add_run()
    run_footer.text = text
    run_footer.font.size = Pt(8)
    run_footer.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MUTED_GRAY)
    run_footer.font.name = "Aptos"


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(240, 240, 240)
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 200, 200)
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(1)


def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[6]
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(slide_layout)
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, NAVY)

    title_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(8.3), Inches(1.2), "COMPLIANCE UPDATE", font_size=40, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    subtitle_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(3.6), Inches(8.3), Inches(0.8), "Q4 2025 Regulatory Review & Key Updates", font_size=18, bold=False, color=MUTED_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(5.5), Inches(3.3), Inches(2.3), Pt(2))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_BLUE)
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, "CONFIDENTIAL — INTERNAL USE ONLY")


def slide_02_overview(prs):
    slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[6]
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(slide_layout)
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, WHITE)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), "OVERVIEW")

    title_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(0.7), "Key Regulatory Updates", font_size=24, bold=True, color=NAVY)
    subtitle_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.5), Inches(11.0), Inches(0.5), "Summary of recent regulatory changes affecting our operations across multiple jurisdictions.", font_size=13, bold=False, color=MUTED_GRAY)

    card_1 = add_card(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(2.4), CARD_WIDTH, Inches(3.6),
                      "Data Privacy Regulations",
                      "GDPR amendments effective 2025\nCCPA enforcement updates\nCross-border data transfer rules")

    card_2 = add_card(slide, Inches(0.8) + CARD_WIDTH + CARD_GAP, Inches(2.4), CARD_WIDTH, Inches(3.6),
                      "Financial Reporting Standards",
                      "SOX compliance enhancements\nIFRS 17 implementation\nAudit committee requirements")

    card_3 = add_card(slide, Inches(0.8) + (CARD_WIDTH + CARD_GAP) * 2, Inches(2.4), CARD_WIDTH, Inches(3.6),
                      "Industry-Specific Compliance",
                      "Healthcare data protection rules\nFinancial services regulations\nTechnology sector guidelines")

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_03_risk_assessment(prs):
    slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[6]
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(slide_layout)
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, LIGHT_GRAY)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), "RISK ASSESSMENT")

    title_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(0.7), "Compliance Risk Matrix", font_size=24, bold=True, color=NAVY)
    subtitle_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.5), Inches(11.0), Inches(0.5), "Prioritized risk categories based on regulatory exposure and organizational impact.", font_size=13, bold=False, color=MUTED_GRAY)

    card_1 = add_card(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(2.4), Inches(5.6), Inches(3.6),
                      "High Priority Items",
                      "Cross-border data transfer compliance\nVendor risk assessment program\nIncident response plan updates")

    card_2 = add_card(slide, Inches(7.1), Inches(2.4), Inches(5.6), Inches(3.6),
                      "Medium Priority Items",
                      "Employee training certification tracking\nPolicy review and revision cycle\nThird-party audit scheduling")

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_04_action_plan(prs):
    slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[6]
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(slide_layout)
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, WHITE)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), "NEXT STEPS")

    title_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(0.7), "Implementation Timeline", font_size=24, bold=True, color=NAVY)
    subtitle_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.5), Inches(11.0), Inches(0.5), "Structured action plan with defined milestones and accountability assignments.", font_size=13, bold=False, color=MUTED_GRAY)

    card_1 = add_card(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(2.4), CARD_WIDTH, Inches(3.6),
                      "Immediate Actions (0-30 days)",
                      "Complete data inventory audit\nUpdate privacy policy documentation\nBrief executive leadership team")

    card_2 = add_card(slide, Inches(0.8) + CARD_WIDTH + CARD_GAP, Inches(2.4), CARD_WIDTH, Inches(3.6),
                      "Short-Term Goals (30-90 days)",
                      "Deploy enhanced monitoring tools\nConduct staff compliance training\nEstablish vendor review process")

    card_3 = add_card(slide, Inches(0.8) + (CARD_WIDTH + CARD_GAP) * 2, Inches(2.4), CARD_WIDTH, Inches(3.6),
                      "Long-Term Strategy (90+ days)",
                      "Implement automated compliance tracking\nDevelop continuous improvement framework\nEstablish quarterly review cadence")

    add_footer(slide)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_overview(prs)
    slide_03_risk_assessment(prs)
    slide_04_action_plan(prs)

    prs.save("legal_compliance.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
